mnemonics.title: S.C.R.A.P.S
mnemonics.content: S - Smart Assistance (voice assistants, chatbots), C - Classification (spam filters, content moderation), R - Recommendation (suggestion engines), A - Automation (task scheduling, workflow), P - Prediction (forecasting, anomaly detection), S - Security (facial recognition, threat detection)

mnemonics.title: A.I. Runs Silently In The Background
mnemonics.content: A - Analysis (data processing), I - Inference (making predictions), R - Recognition (images, speech, text), S - Synthesis (generating content), I - Iteration (continuous learning), T - Transformation (converting inputs), B - Background (unseen operation)

mnemonics.title: The Invisible Helper
mnemonics.content: When you type, AI suggests; when you browse, AI recommends; when you sleep, AI learns; when you call, AI listens; when you scan, AI identifies; when you shop, AI predicts

acronyms.usage: Used when AI services communicate with other applications in the background
Used in background AI for voice assistants, chatbots, and text analysis
Used in background AI for image recognition, facial recognition, and object detection
The core technology enabling AI to learn and improve in background applications
Used for complex background AI tasks like neural networks for pattern recognition

acronyms.expansion: Artificial Intelligence at the edge of networks
acronyms.usage: Background AI processing on local devices rather than cloud
Background AI that runs entirely on your phone/laptop without internet

visualTips.visualization: Imagine an iceberg - only the tip (what you see/interact with) is visible, while 90% of the AI work happens beneath the surface (background processing)
Picture a factory assembly line: data comes in (raw materials), AI processes it (manufacturing), insights come out (finished products) - all running silently in the background
Think of AI as a silent student that studies 24/7, taking notes (training) even while you're not using the device
Imagine AI as a shadow that follows you, learning your patterns - when you wake up it prepares your schedule, when you drive it predicts routes, when you shop it suggests items

analogies.analogy: Like a skilled butler in a grand mansion - anticipating needs, working silently, never disturbing the master, yet always ready with the right information or action at the right moment
Like a personal shopping assistant who watches what you look at, remembers your preferences, and quietly places suggestions nearby - you never asked, but there it is
Like a loyal guard dog at the mailbox - silently intercepting junk mail, only alerting you (or not) about important letters, learning over time what constitutes spam
Like finishing someone's sentence - AI reads your thoughts mid-sentence and offers to complete them, like a mind reader working in the background
Like an invisible personal secretary sitting in the corner of the room, always listening for their name, taking notes and executing commands without disrupting the conversation
Like a security camera with a brain - watching normal activity patterns 24/7, silently alert only when something unusual happens, like a vigilant sentinel
